title: Earthy Crumbly Tomato Spanish Crumble
description: A cozy and earthy crumbly dish featuring shaoxing wine, tomatoes, and other aromatic ingredients that are jain-friendly.
instructions: Wash and slice the tomatoes into thin pieces.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add sliced onions and sauté until translucent.
Add minced garlic and cook for about 30 seconds to let it smell fragrant but not browned.
Stir in sun-dried tomatoes, reduce shaoxing wine to half its volume using low heat, ensuring no alcohol remains and the liquid thickens slightly. Season with salt as needed.
Remove from heat and transfer mixture into a mixing bowl or serving dish.
Sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese evenly over the tomato mixture.
Drizzle olive oil on top of cheese for added moisture if desired.
